name: Ketchup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the top stem ends from the tomatoes and peppers.
2. Rinse all vegetables thoroughly.
3. Cook the tomatoes, onions, celery, and peppers together until they are soft and mushy.
4. Force the mixture through a food press or very fine strainer to extract the juice.
5. Place the strained mixture in a soup kettle and add the remaining ingredients (sugar, vinegar, cloves, allspice, cinnamon, and salt).
6. Boil for 10 minutes.
7. Pour into hot, sterilized jars and seal. Makes about 6 Pints.
